description_long: This pedestrian adult is depicted as a humanoid figure dressed in a formal suit jacket with a bow tie and pocket square, paired with unconventional lower attire consisting of briefs and semi-transparent tights. The figure is wearing high-heeled shoes and is holding a long, cylindrical object resembling a baton or silenced pistol in one hand. The head features a stylized, sculpted hair or headpiece with prominent ear coverings, and the face is expressionless and smooth. The hands and legs are proportionate and human-like, with the overall build being slender and upright. The combination of formal upper wear and unusual lower garments creates a striking and eccentric appearance suitable for an urban or theatrical context.
description: A slender adult figure in a suit jacket, bow tie, briefs, tights, and high heels, holding a baton-like object. The look is formal above and unconventional below, with a stylized headpiece.
description_view_0: Front view shows the suit jacket, bow tie, briefs, tights, high heels, and the baton-like object held in the right hand.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the headpiece, the fitted jacket, and the high-heeled shoe.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the suit jacket, briefs, tights, and both high-heeled shoes, with the baton visible in the right hand.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the baton-like object in the right hand, the side of the suit jacket, and the high-heeled shoe.
attribute_clothing_type: formal suit jacket with bow tie and pocket square, briefs, semi-transparent tights
attribute_hairstyle: sculpted headpiece with prominent ear coverings
